agentTypes.name: Contract
agentTypes.description: Auction smart contract. Has global state

agentTypes.name: User
agentTypes.description: Participants that can bid by depositing ETH

agents.name: bidder
agents.description: User that makes bid to the contract to buy NFT

agents.name: nft
agents.description: NFT that is sold during auction

elements.text: contract.started && timestamp >= contract.endAt && contract.ended == 0 && contract.highestBidder == address_0

actions.name: end_win
actions.description: Transfer NFT to Winner & ETH to Seller

elements.text: contract.started && timestamp >= contract.endAt && contract.ended == 0 && contract.highestBidder != address_0

actions.name: startAuction
actions.description: Transfer NFT from Seller to Contract

elements.text: contract.started && timestamp < contract.endAt && value > contract.highestBid && contract.highestBidder == address_0
contract.started && timestamp < contract.endAt && value > contract.highestBid && contract.highestBidder != address_0

body:
contract.started == 0 && contract.ended == 0 &&
contract.highestBid == 0 && 
contract.highestBidder == address_0 && 
contract.seller == seller_address &&  
contract.msg_sender == seller.address &&
contract.balance == 0 &&
bidder.balance == 100 && bidder.address == bidder_address &&
seller.balance == 0 && seller.address == seller_address &&
timestamp == 0 && days == 1
